entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A versatile dryland crop known for its high calcium content

entities.name: CALCIUM CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of calcium present in the grains of finger millet

entities.name: GRAIN NUTRIENTS
entities.description: The overall nutritional components found in the grains

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of improving the nutritional quality of food crops through breeding

entities.name: FINGER MILLET DIVERSITY PANEL
entities.description: A collection of 310 accessions and four controls used to assess variability

entities.name: ICRISAT HYDERABAD
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics located in Hyderabad, India

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Physical and growth characteristics of the crop used for evaluation

entities.name: INDUCTIVELY COUPLED PLASMA OPTICAL EMISSION ELECTROMETRY
entities.description: An analytical technique used to determine the content of grain nutrients

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of protein present in the finger millet grains

entities.name: TOTAL NITROGEN CONTENT
entities.description: The total amount of nitrogen used as a proxy to estimate protein content

entities.name: SULFURIC ACID–SELENIUM DIGESTION METHOD
entities.description: A chemical method used to estimate protein content from total nitrogen

entities.name: GENOTYPE
entities.description: The genetic constitution of an individual accession

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The external conditions and surroundings where the crop is grown

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Geographic region from which some finger millet accessions were sourced

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Geographic region from which some finger millet accessions were sourced

entities.name: MAGNESIUM CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of magnesium present in the grains

entities.name: IRON CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of iron present in the grains

entities.name: ZINC CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of zinc present in the grains

entities.name: DRYLAND
entities.description: Arid or semi-arid environmental conditions
